primary_color.description: Brand primary color (hex, e.g. #1B3A6B). Wired to CSS custom property --brand-primary.

monogram.description: Sidebar / topbar initials (1–8 chars). Displayed in the tenant chip monogram.

logo_path.description: URL or asset path to the tenant logo. Displayed in the authenticated topbar (left slot) and as a fallback on the login screen.

favicon_path.description: Legacy favicon URL applied to <link rel=icon>. Prefer favicon_url for new seeds.

login_banner.description: HTML-safe banner text for the LoginPage hero panel (rendered as plain text). Shown below the hero heading when tagline is not set.

footer_text.description: Legacy footer text displayed on the login screen when footer_copyright is not set.

product_name.description: Product name shown in the browser tab title and the sidebar header (e.g. 'DocManager'). Supports no placeholders — must be a literal string.

tagline.description: Short marketing tagline shown on the login hero panel below the welcome heading. Supports {product_name} and {tenant_display_name} placeholders.

welcome_message.description: Welcome heading shown in the login form column. Supports {product_name} and {tenant_display_name} placeholders. Default: 'Welcome to {product_name}'.

subtitle.description: Sub-heading under the welcome message on the login form. Supports {product_name} and {tenant_display_name} placeholders. Default: '{tenant_display_name} — Document Operations'.

login_logo_url.description: URL for the logo shown on the login screen (hero panel and mobile header). Falls back to logo_path if not set.

login_background_color.description: Solid hex background color for the login screen hero panel. Overrides the default brand-navy. Set either this or login_background_image_url, not both.

login_background_image_url.description: URL for a background image on the login screen hero panel. When set, covers the gradient blobs.

footer_copyright.description: Copyright line shown at the bottom of the login form. Supports {year} and {tenant_display_name} placeholders. Example: '© {year} {tenant_display_name}. All rights reserved.'

support_email.description: Support contact email address shown on the login screen footer and error pages.

support_phone.description: Support phone number shown on the login screen footer and error pages (e.g. '+975 2 322777').

favicon_url.description: Favicon URL applied to <link rel=icon> at runtime. Takes precedence over favicon_path.

theme_mode.description: UI color scheme preference. 'light' enforces the light theme, 'dark' enforces dark, 'auto' follows the OS system preference. Default: 'light'.
